hooks.name: after-schema-change
hooks.description: Remind about Prisma migration and type generation after schema changes
hooks.command: echo 'Schema changed! Run: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name <description> && npx prisma generate'
hooks.message:
Prisma schema was modified. Remember to:
1. Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name <description>` to create a migration
2. Run `npx prisma generate` to update the client
3. Update corresponding DTOs and service methods
4. Verify tests still pass

hooks.name: check-secrets-before-commit
hooks.description: Check for hardcoded secrets before committing
hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only | ForEach-Object { Select-String -Path $_ -Pattern '(password|secret|api_key|token)\s*[:=]\s*["''][^"'']+["'']' -CaseSensitive:$false } 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Error 'Potential hardcoded secrets detected!'; exit 1 }
hooks.message: Checking staged files for potential hardcoded secrets (passwords, API keys, tokens). Use environment variables instead.
